sections.sectionTitle: Leenggah Lo leh A Khote Thugentehna

verses.text: Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah thugentehna zangin thu hilh a, “Mi khat in lo zuanin leenggui suan a, a kimkot umin leenggah cilna ding bawl a, a hon'na ding tausang khat a lam khit ciangin, lo khawhlawhte khawhlawhsak a, amah gamdangah a pai hi
Leenggah lawh hun a tun' ciangin ama ngahding tangteng a la dingin lo khawhlawhte kiangah a nasemte khat a paisak hi
Lo khawhlawhte in tua a nasempa manin satgawp uh a, a guak ciahsak kik uh hi
Tua ciangin lo neipa in a nasem dang khat a sawl hi. Amaute in tuapa a lutang na liamsakgawp uh a, a na simmawh bawl uh hi
Tua ciangin adang khat sawl leuleu a, a na that uh hi. Tua bangin adang tampi sawl a, pawlkhat na satgawp uh a, pawlkhat na that uh hi
Tua ciangin a sawltheih ding a it mahmah a tapa khat bek omlai ahih manin, ‘Amaute in ka tapa na zahtakbawl ding uh hi,’ ci-in a nunung penin a sawl hi
Ahi zongin lo khawhlawhte in, ‘Hihpa pen a gamhluah dingpa ahi hi. Pai un; amah va that huan ni; tua hi leh hih ama luah ding gamh eima-a' suak ding hi,’ a kici uh hi
Tua ahih manin amah manin that uh a, lo nawlah a pai uh hi
“Tua ahih leh loneipa in bangci bawl ding ahi hiam? Amah hong pai-in lo khawhlawhte that ding a, a lo, midangte a khawhlawhsak ding hi
‘Innlamte in a nilkhiat suang pen innkiu suang bulpi suak khinta hi
Hih thu Topa' bawl hi a, i muh ciangin lamdang i sa hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Hih thugentehna pen amaute a cihnopna-a a gen ahihlam Jew makaite in thei uh ahih manin Jesuh a kimat theihna ding a hanciam uh hi. Ahi zongin mihonpite kihta uh ahih manin Jesuh bangmah cihloin a paisan uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh ama kampauna tawh a kimat theihna dingin Farisi mi pawlkhat leh Herod mi pawlkhat Jesuh kiangah thudong dingin hong kisawl hi

Amaute in, “Sia aw, nangmah in thutang genin, midangte' pauding phamawh na saklohna, uliante' maitang zahtak tuanloin, Pasian in mite a gamtat dingin a deihna thute tangtakin na hilhna ka thei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Rom Kumpipa Sisar tungah siah i piak ding kilawm ahi hiam, kilawmlo ahi hiam

Pia ding ihi hiam, pialo ding ihi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi. Ahi zongin Jesuh in amau lungsimtawng thei ahih manin, “Bang hangin kei hong thangsiah se na hi uh hiam? Ka et dingin dangka peek khat hong la dih un,” a ci hi

Amaute in zong dangka peek khat hong paipih uh a, tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Hih dangka tunga om kua' lim hi a, kua' min ahi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin, “Rom Kumpipa Sisar' lim leh a min ahi hi,” ci-in a dawng uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in, “Tua ahih leh, Sisar' neihsate Sisar' tungah pia un la, Pasian' neihsate Pasian' tungah pia un,” a ci hi. Tua ama thudawn'na hangin lamdang a sa mahmah uh hi.
Tua ciangin, thawhkikna omlo hi, a ci Saddusi mi pawlkhat hong pai leuleu uh a
“Sia aw, ‘Mi khat in ta neiloin a zi a sihsan leh tua a si mipa' khang a kizop theihna dingin a naupa in tua meigongnu ten'pih ding hi,’ ci-in Moses in eite-a' dingin ngeina a koih hi
Khatvei, unau pasal sagih om uh hi. A u pen in zi nei a, ta neiloin a si hi
A nau in a upa' zi luah hi; amah zong ta neiloin si leuleu hi. A thumnapa
leh adangte khempeuh, a sagihna dong in tuanu ten'pih uh a, ta neilo vive mahin a si uh hi. A tawpna ciangin tua numei zong a si hi
Tua ahih leh, hih unau pasal sagihte in hihnu ten'pih kim ciat uh ahih manin, mi khempeuh a thawhkik ni ciangin a kua pen' zi hi ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in, “Na khial mahmah uh hi. Lai Siangtho ahi a, Pasian' vangliatna ahi zongin na theihlohna hang uh ahi hi
Sihna panin mite a thawhkik ciangin vantungah a om vantung mite mah bangin zinei pasalnei cih omlo ding uh hi

Thawhkikna thu tawh kisai-in ci lehang, Moses' laigelhna sung sawlpang kuang thu a genna munah Pasian in Moses kiangah, ‘Kei pen Abraham' Pasian, Isaac' Pasian, Jakob' Pasian ka hi hi,’ a cihna mun sim ngeilo na hi uh hiam
Tua bang a cih ciangin Pasian pen misite' Pasian hiloin mihingte' Pasian hi, a ci nuam ahi hi. Tua ahih manin na ngaihsun khial mahmah uh hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.

Tua thukidotna a za Thukham hilh siate khat in, Saddusi mite' dotnate limtakin Jesuh in a dawn'theihna a muh ciangin Jesuh hong neh a, “Thukham khempeuh lakah bang thukham a lianpen ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Jesuh in, “Thukham a lianpen in: Israel mite aw, ngai un: I Topa Pasian bek mah Topa ahi hi
Na Topa Pasian uh, na lungsim khempeuh, na nuntakna khempeuh, na pilna khempeuh, leh na thahatna khempeuh uh tawh na it un, a cihna ahi hi
A nihna in: Nangma pumpi na it bangin na vengte na it in, cihna ahi hi. Hihte gel sangin thukham a lianzaw a dang om nawnlo hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua ciangin Thukham hilh siapa in, “Sia aw, na gen mah bangin hi ka sa mahmah hi. Topa bek mah Pasian hi a, amah simloh pasian dang kuamah omlo hi

Mite in a lungsim khempeuh, a pilna khempeuh, leh a hatna khempeuh uh tawh Pasian itin, amau pumpi a it bangin a vengte a it ding uh ahi hi. Pasian biakna dingin biakna tau tunga gan gawhnate leh biakna dang khempeuh sangin hih thukham nihte zuih ding thupizaw takpi hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in hih mipa' thugenzia hoihsa ahih manin, “Pasian' Ukna sungah a om dektak mahmah na hi hi,” a ci hi. Tua khita kipanin Jesuh kiangah kuamah in thu dong ngam nawnlo uh hi.
Jesuh in biakinn sungah thu a hilh laitakin, “Bang hangin Thukham hilh siate in Khrih pen David' suan hi lel hi, ci thei uh ahi hiam
Kha Siangtho' sawlna tawh David mahmah in thu gen a, ‘Topa in keima Topa tungah thu gen hi: Na galte, na khe nuai-ah ka koih matengin, ka taklamah na tu in,’ ci hi
David mahmah in Khrih pen ‘Topa,’ ci hi. Tua ahih leh Khrih pen David' suan hi lel, cih mawkmawk ding hithei ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Mihonte in hih thu a zak uh ciangin a lungdam mahmah uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in Thukham Hilh Siate Mawhsak

verses.text: Jesuh in a thuhilhna-ah, “Thukham hilh sia pawlkhatte na bat khaklohna dingun na kidawm un. Amaute in puantualpi silhnuam uh a, mite lakah mite in a zahtak hopih ding a deih uh hi
Kikhopna inn sungah, uliante-a' dingin a kikoihcing tutphah nuamte tungah tunuam uh a, pawi sungah zong uliante' tutna mun hoihte bekah a tunuam uh hi

Meigong numeite tungah nuamtaksa-in a neihsate laksakin zangmang uh a, mite in mihoih a saktheihna ding uh a deihna hangun thu saupipi a ngen uh hi. Amau' kineihkhemna tawh kizui-in a gimthuak ding uh lianzaw ding hi,” a ci hi.
Biakinn sumpi khiatna kuang gei-ah Jesuh tu a, mihonte in sumpi a khiat laitakun a en hi. A haute in tampipi hong khia uh hi
A zawng meigong numei khat zong hong pai a, sumnen tang nih hong khia hi
Tua ciangin a nungzuite sam a, “Adangte khempeuh sangin hih mizawng meigongnu in tam khia zaw hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh adangte in a neihval a lamval sung panun a khia uh ahi hi; ahi zongin amah zawng mahmah napi-in ama kivakna ding nangawn sitloin a neih khempeuh a khiakhin ahi hi,” a ci hi.
